message:
chore(gitignore): exclude golden .actual diagnostic dumps (uiojh)

Tests under tests/golden_robot_json.rs and tests/pages_export_golden.rs
write a .actual sibling next to the golden when comparison fails, so the
developer can diff locally before regenerating with UPDATE_GOLDENS=1.
These files are transient and never belong in the tree — today one such
file (tests/golden/robot/health.json.actual) was left behind by an
earlier iteration of ilnj9 and has been lingering untracked.

Add tests/golden/**/*.actual to .gitignore so future diagnostic dumps
are silenced from git status.

The existing untracked health.json.actual stays on disk per RULE 1 (no
file deletion without express permission) but is now ignored.

Follow-up slice on uiojh scope item 7 (clean working tree).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -184,3 +184,8 @@ storage.sqlite3-wal.corrupt-*
 # NTM per-repo state (rate-limit tracking, session metadata) — regenerated on demand
 .ntm/
 .claude/settings.local.json
+
+# Golden-file actual-dump outputs — written by tests/golden_robot_json.rs and
+# tests/pages_export_golden.rs when a golden diverges from expected, strictly
+# for local diffing ahead of UPDATE_GOLDENS=1 regeneration. Never committed.
+tests/golden/**/*.actual
